info.title: Bringin APIs

post.description:
One API to connect to Bringin or onboard users to Bringin.

Bringin checks if the email is associated with an existing Bringin user. Based on the result:

**If the user exists and is not connected to the Application:**
- Bringin sends a co-branded email requesting the user's consent to establish the connection.
- The API response confirms that the user has been invited to approve the connection.
- You should prompt the user to check their email and complete the process.
- Once the user clicks on "confirm connection link" in the email, you should receive a callback.

**If the user does not exist:**
- Bringin sends a co-branded email inviting the user to onboard with Bringin via a signup link.
- The API response includes the same signup link.
- You can display this link in your application to guide the user to get started with Bringin.
- You will get a webhook when the user completes the KYC.

**If the user exists and the connection is already established:**
API will return the userId.

200.description: User is a Bringin user but connection not enabled

409.description: User already connected or new user

post.description: This API is used to get the rate. The response contains the actual rate and the rate that includes our transaction fee. Our transaction fee also includes your markup. You can configure the markup.
API to request a Bitcoin address for off-ramping - any amount of Bitcoin can be sent to this address based on allowed limits.
Get users' Bitcoin and Euro balance.
Get Euro / Bitcoin deposit details.

Get all transactions of the users. Transaction types include:

- OFFRAMP_WITHOUT_FIAT_WITHDRAWAL // Deposit Bitcoin, convert to Euro and leave it on the IBAN account
- ONRAMP_PARTIAL_FIAT_DEPOSIT // Deposit Euro is already done, swap and withdraw to an address and automatically withdraws
- CRYPTO_DEPOSIT // Bitcoin deposit
- CRYPTO_WITHDRAWAL // Bitcoin withdrawal
- FIAT_DEPOSIT // Fiat deposit
- FIAT_WITHDRAWAL // Fiat Withdrawal
Get real-time on-chain fee estimation by providing the whitelisted Bitcoin address and the amount.

Initiate a Bitcoin withdrawal to one of the whitelisted Bitcoin addresses. All withdrawals need to be confirmed with a verification code.

The destination could also be a bolt11 Lightning invoice. We do not support 0 sat invoice or Bolt 12 invoices.

Initiate a bank transfer to move the Euros to the beneficiary bank account - need verification code from the user to confirm the transfer.

Verification code is sent to their phone and email.
API to confirm bank transfer or withdrawal with OTP
Add a Bitcoin address to the whitelist for withdrawals

get.description: Get all whitelisted Bitcoin addresses for a user

post.description: Resend verification code.
API to add beneficiary details for getting euros to. The API stores the beneficiary details and responds with a corresponding ID.

get.description: API to get all saved beneficiary details.

post.description: Get current onramp rates for buying Bitcoin with Euros
Create an onramp order to buy Bitcoin with Euros
Get the status and details of an onramp order
Initiate withdrawal of Bitcoin from onramp order
Confirm withdrawal of Bitcoin from onramp order with verification code
Resend verification code for onramp withdrawal
Get pending onramp transactions for a user

Provide source and destination currency details with the IP address. The amount provided must be of the source currency at the lower denomination in string. The swap will happen at the market order.

You get the rate in real-time to display the information to the user accordingly.

**Note:** This API is only available for Business accounts with Bitcoin custody enabled.

sourceAmount.description: Amount in the lowest denomination (sats or cents) as string

get.description: Get details of a specific swap transaction by order ID

tags.name: User Onboarding
tags.description: The user needs to accept Bringin's terms and conditions, and onboarding is done on the Bringin interface. We have reduced the onboarding to just 1 API, which requires email and a few more references.

tags.name: Offramp
tags.description:
## Offramp Bitcoin to Bringin IBAN

A set of APIs to create an offramp order to convert incoming Bitcoin deposits into Euros into Bringin's IBAN for users to withdraw anytime.

Single APIs to fetch a Bitcoin address. The Bitcoin sent to this address will be converted to Euro and will be available on Bringin's IBAN.

It is important to get the address by sharing the IP address - the IP is cached against the address for 2 days.

To make a Bitcoin deposit and not convert to Euros, please refer to the account section to get the deposit instructions for the BTC account.

With a new Lightning address, you can get an LN invoice that funds the Euro account. More details here: https://github.com/bringinxyz/ln-address-offramping

tags.name: Account
tags.description:
APIs to deposit Bitcoin / Euros. Withdraw Bitcoin / Euros.

Bitcoin custody is enabled for Businesses, unlike consumer products.

tags.name: Manage Bank Beneficiary
tags.description: APIs to add new Bank beneficiaries to the Euro account withdrawals.

tags.name: Onramp
tags.description: APIs for buying Bitcoin with Euros through various payment methods including Lightning and on-chain transfers.

tags.name: SWAP Currency
tags.description: This is an API only for Business accounts. We enable Bitcoin custody. APIs allow you to instantly swap between Bitcoin ↔ Euros.
